2025 ICCV 中稿论文分布与清单

  • 状态：available
  • 官方入口：https://openaccess.thecvf.com/ICCV2025?day=all
  • 备注：CVF Open Access page available.
  • 纳入论文数：2701

Distribution

领域 篇数 占比
LLM/NLP 116 4.3%
Computer Vision 1410 52.2%
Multimodal 31 1.1%
Reinforcement Learning 8 0.3%
Robotics/Embodied AI 68 2.5%
Generative Models 269 10.0%
AI for Science 22 0.8%
ML Theory 12 0.4%
Optimization 27 1.0%
Trustworthy/Safety/Fairness 72 2.7%
Data/Training Systems 225 8.3%
Applications 49 1.8%
Other 392 14.5%
Total 2701 100.0%
